lemmas: [Group G] → ∀ (H K : Subgroup G), H ≤ K ↔ ((H : Set G) ⊆ K)
(H : Subgroup G) → H ≤ Maximal G
(H K : Subgroup G) → x ∈ H ∩ K ↔ x ∈ H ∧ x ∈ K
(H K : Subgroup G) → H ∩ K ≤ H
(H K : Subgroup G) → H ∩ K ≤ K
(L H K : Subgroup G) → L ≤ H → L ≤ K → L ≤ H ∩ K
(H K : Subgroup G) → H ∩ K = K ∩ H
(H₁ H₂ H₃ : Subgroup G) → (H₁ ∩ H₂) ∩ H₃ = H₁ ∩ (H₂ ∩ H₃)
(S : Set G) → S ⊆ Generate S
(S : Set G) (H : Subgroup G) → S ⊆ H → Generate S ≤ H
(S : Set G) (H : Subgroup G) → Generate S = H ↔ S ⊆ H ∧ H ≤ Generate S
(H : Subgroup G) → Generate (H : Set G) = H
Generate (∅ : Set G) = Minimal G
(S T : Set G) → S ⊆ T → Generate S ≤ Generate T
(S : Set G) (H : Subgroup G) → S ⊆ H ↔ Generate S ≤ H
(x : G) → x ∈ Pows x
(x : G) → Pows x = Generate ({x} : Set G)
(x : G) → Generate ({x} : Set G) ≤ Pows x
(x : G) → Pows x ≤ Generate ({x} : Set G)
(x : G) (n : ℤ) → gpow x n ∈ Pows x
(x : G) (n : ℤ) → ((gpowMap x n : Pows x) : G) = gpow x n
(x : G) (n : ℕ) (k : Fin n) → ((finPowMap x n k : Pows x) : G) = gpow x k
{x : G} → order x = 0 → Function.Injective (gpowMap x)
{x : G} → order x = 0 → Function.Surjective (gpowMap x)
{x : G} → order x = 0 → Bijective (gpowMap x)
(x : G) → Nat.card (Pows x) = order x
{x : G} → order x = 0 → ∃ (φ : ℤ → Pows x), Isomorphism φ
(S : Set G) (g : G) → g ∈ Generate S ↔ ∀ H : Subgroup G, S ⊆ H → g ∈ H
(H K : Subgroup G) (g : G) → g ∈ H ∩ K → g ∈ H
(H K : Subgroup G) (g : G) → g ∈ H ∩ K → g ∈ K
(H K : Subgroup G) (g : G) → g ∈ H → g ∈ K → g ∈ H ∩ K
